title: How to not have the group title continue to "duplicate" over and over when setting a daily group duplication automation
excerpt: Hello! Been trying to set a daily automation in a monday board where each day it duplicates the top group in the board. It does this but always carries over the “Duplicate of” every time. Is there a way to set this to no…

posts.author: tombarile (Tom Barile)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! Been trying to set a daily automation in a monday board where each day it duplicates the top group in the board. It does this but always carries over the “Duplicate of” every time. Is there a way to set this to not happen?

Screen Shot 2022-06-22 at 12.34.49 AM2792×1312 307 KB

posts.author: evernon9 (Erica Vernon)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having a very similar issue. I have created a board for each type of service my company provides. These services are for the same set of clients that are the items in a group and we provide these services on a quarterly basis. I was hoping to set up an automation to duplicate the top group and clear the status and other columns. However, the duplication just continues to reoccur making quite a mess. Also, all of the attached automations to clear columns were applied to my original group and not the new duplication of the group.

I spoke with a representative on the matter and was told that I would need to manually duplicate the top group and use Batch Actions to clear the columns.
